title: DeepImmuno: Curated Peptide-MHC Immunogenicity Dataset
description: Curated peptide-MHC class I immunogenicity training and benchmark data from DeepImmuno. Includes IEDB-derived training set with immunogenicity labels, dengue virus validation set, TESLA tumor neoantigen benchmark, and SARS-CoV-2 epitope predictions. Each entry contains peptide sequence, HLA allele, and immunogenicity classification.
